description: <b>Style Note</b> Durable, versatile, uniquely designed and reasonably priced, these fashionable jeans from locomotive are designed for the man with a high fashion casual attitude. Crafted from durable cotton fabric, these denims are here to stay and offer exemplary comfort. Pair them with a semi-formal shirt or a tee, and sports shoes. <b>Product Details</b> Blue washed jeans, has a zippered and a buttoned closure, belt loops on the waistband, brand patch at the back on the waistband, two insert pockets in front with a coin pocket inside the right pocket and two patch pockets at the back with stitched detailing <b>Material and Care</b> 100% cotton Machine wash warm separately Do not bleach Tumble dry low Use warm iron <b>Size and Fit</b> Super slim fit The model (height 6' and waist 32") is wearing a size 32 <b>Style Note</b>Durable, versatile, uniquely designed and reasonably priced, these fashionable jeans from Locomotive are designed for the man with a high fashion casual attitude. Crafted from durable cotton fabric, these denims are here to stay and offer exemplary comfort.
